description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing human figure with an elongated, stylized form, rendered in a dark, weathered material that suggests bronze or patinated metal. The figure stands upright on a roughly hewn rectangular base, with both arms raised: one hand resting on the head and the other extended outward. The body is slender and anatomically simplified, with subtle surface texturing that hints at musculature and drapery. The facial features are indistinct, emphasizing the abstract and expressive nature of the piece. The overall posture conveys a sense of contemplation or shielding, and the sculpture's surface has a mottled, greenish patina typical of aged bronze.
description: A slender, abstract human figure in dark, patinated metal stands upright with one arm raised to the head and the other extended outward, mounted on a rough rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the figure's face, both arms raised, and the full frontal posture with one hand on the head and the other extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the extended arm and the curvature of the body, with the head and hand gesture clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back musculature, both arms raised, and the figure's stance on the base.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the outstretched arm and the profile of the head and torso.
attribute_location_context: No specific environmental context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
